59545, 8305, 12546, 79575, 90314, 16353, 2846, 56964, 99445, 58265, 57138, 4890]
A6 = [18815, 41318, 43384, 25773, 92044, 49643, 47981, 93894, 95687, 70703, 30731, 68434, 72338, 84459, 64263, 77789, 36144, 99936, 4330, 28776, 30129, 77121, 34863, 33237, 35332, 96282, 48201, 52220,
